metadata.title:
MORE CAR
LINES FOR


NORTH HILL

pages.raw_text:
BY unanimous vote the city coun-
Gil has responded to the numerous
requests for additional car facii-
ties in the Lidgerwood district and
passed the franchise asked by the
Washington Water Power company
for new car lines on Division and
Addison streets from Liberty ave
nue. to Rowan avenue. Each OF
these lines will branch from the
old LidaerWood line at Liberty ave.
nue. and run north a mile and a
half into district that at the pres
ent has no car service


The granting of tho franchise
was urged at recent meeting OF
the people of that locality held at
the Hamilton school. Several pc,
titions in favor of granting the
franchises were circulated and
signed by hundreds of property
owners and citizens living in the
territory tributary to the proposed
extensions.


The only objection to the build
ing of the new lines was entered
by property owners residing along
!idgerwood street from which it
is proposed to remove the car line
east one. block to Addison street.
They filed a demonstrating petition,
but in the meeting at the Hami
ton school only four votes out of
200 people present opposed the
granting of the franchise.


Councilman Funk tried to get a
mo seat, no fare" provision into
the franchise. and one calling for
q universal franchise, but this eff
fort was defeated.
